name: CGN Nuclear Technology Development Co., Ltd.
summary: CGN Nuclear Technology Development Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of modified cable polymer materials, engineering plastic products, and electron accelerators in China. Its products are used in nuclear power, new energy, rail transit, aerospace, automobile, construction, optical communication, and electronics industries, as well as offshore equipment. The company also exports its products. In addition, it offers irradiation processing services; and engages in ocean shipping, property, project contracting, pelagic fishery, and international trading businesses. The company was formerly known as China Dalian International Cooperation (Group) Holdings Ltd. and changed its name to CGN Nuclear Technology Development Co., Ltd. in February 2017. CGN Nuclear Technology Development Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Shenzhen, China. CGN Nuclear Technology Development Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of CGN (Beijing) Nuclear Technology Application Co., Ltd.
